stories.headline: Vercel Breach Leaks Crypto Project API Keys, Orca and Web3 Teams Scramble
stories.tldr: Vercel disclosed a security incident exposing customer API keys, forcing crypto teams hosting wallet UIs on the platform to rotate credentials en masse.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Vercel hosts the front-ends of dozens of major DeFi protocols — a single infra provider compromise can translate into coordinated phishing or UI-swap attacks across the stack.
the_details: Vercel warned customers that API keys and environment variables may have been accessed during the breach window.
Solana DEX Orca and other Web3 teams publicly confirmed credential rotations within hours of disclosure.
Incident lands just 24 hours after the $292M Kelp DAO exploit, compounding security pressure on the sector.

stories.headline: DeFi TVL Bleeds $13.2B in 48 Hours as Aave Sheds $8.45B After Kelp Contagion
stories.tldr: DeFi total value locked collapsed $13.2B in two days as Aave depositors fled following attackers' use of stolen rsETH as collateral.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The fastest DeFi deposit flight since Terra shows how one LayerZero-era bridge exploit can cascade into cross-protocol bad debt and force every money market to re-price LRT collateral.
the_details: Aave's TVL dropped from $26.4B on April 18 to roughly $20B by Sunday morning as depositors withdrew.
AAVE token fell 16% as the DAO works to quantify bad debt from rsETH-collateralized borrows.
SparkLend, Fluid and Upshift all froze rsETH markets; Fear & Greed Index fell to 23 (Extreme Fear).

stories.headline: Bitcoin Tests $75K Support as Market Cap Sheds 1.6%, Fear Index Crashes to 27
stories.tldr: BTC is pinned near $74.5K as global crypto market cap slips to $2.59T and sentiment flips to fear ahead of a bruising week of contagion headlines.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The $75K line is the pivot between a routine pullback and a trend break — a daily close below it opens a path to $70K and would validate altcoin underperformance.
the_details: BTC traded at $74,547 with $32.4B in 24h volume; ETH held 10.6% dominance as BTC printed 57.4%.
Fear & Greed Index printed 27 Friday, a three-week low, before deepening to 23 over the weekend.
Solana led majors lower at -3.06%; CMC Altcoin Season Index sits at 34/100 — firmly Bitcoin Season.

stories.headline: CFTC Names First Five Staff to Innovation Task Force, Crypto Rulebook in Flight
stories.tldr: The CFTC staffed up its Innovation Task Force with its first five appointees to draft clearer rules for crypto, AI, and prediction markets.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: With the SEC-CFTC MOU signed in March and Clarity Act back in the Senate, CFTC's staffing signals a post-turf-war posture — expect harmonized spot-crypto rules within the year.
the_details: Task force was announced April 10 to translate the SEC-CFTC March 11 Memorandum of Understanding into rules.
Mandate explicitly covers crypto assets, prediction markets, and AI-enabled market products.
Follows April 13 SEC staff no-action posture on DEX front-end operators as non-broker-dealers.

stories.headline: SOON Rips 90% on Upbit Debut, Crosses $100M Cap as Altcoin Green Shoots Emerge
stories.tldr: Solana-aligned SOON surged nearly 90% in 24 hours after listing on Korea's Upbit, pushing its market cap above $100M amid broader altcoin weakness.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: With BTC dominance at 58.5%, a Korean-retail-driven listing pump is one of the few live playbooks still working for altcoins — expect more projects to court Upbit's gatekeeper effect.
the_details: SOON market cap crossed $100M as Upbit listing drove Korean-session volume spikes.
BIO Protocol (+17.5%) and Axelar (+29.1%) also bucked the tape last week despite extreme fear readings.
Altcoin Season Index at 34/100 shows rotation is idiosyncratic, not broad — liquidity is chasing narratives.
